/usr/bin/ar qc libbackup_core.a CMakeFiles/backup_core.dir/src/core/Utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backup_core.dir/src/core/Metadata.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backup_core.dir/src/core/Filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backup_core.dir/src/core/Archive.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backup_core.dir/src/core/Crypto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backup_core.dir/src/core/Incremental.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backup_core.dir/src/core/BackupEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backup_core.dir/src/core/Scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backup_core.dir/src/core/UserManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backup_core.dir/src/core/TaskManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backup_core.dir/src/core/AuthManager.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libbackup_core.a
